run_summary.summary: Brandi couldn't complete her Gmail scan today — the OAuth refresh token returned `invalid_grant`, meaning the Gmail authorization has expired or been revoked. No emails were scanned and no deals were updated. To fix this, Liz (or Kenny) needs to re-authorize Brandi's Gmail access. Until then, Brandi won't be able to pick up new inbound opportunities or track deal activity automatically.

suggestions.message: Gmail OAuth token is expired or revoked. Re-authorize Brandi's Gmail access to resume automatic deal tracking.
